{"number":5,"title":"Step 1: Project scaffolding & dependencies","body":"## Summary

Initialize the monorepo structure with `backend/` and `frontend/` directories, configure all tooling, and install dependencies. This mirrors the `JobApplicationAutomationTool` project conventions.

**Parent Epic**: #1

## Tasks

### Backend (`backend/`)

- [x] `uv init` with `pyproject.toml` (Python >=3.13)
- [x] Create `.python-version` file: `3.13`
- [ ] Add production dependencies to `pyproject.toml`:
  - `pydantic-ai[openai,mcp,web]` — agent framework + MCP client + built-in web UI
  - `fastapi>=0.115.0`, `uvicorn[standard]>=0.34.0` — API server
  - `pydantic[email]>=2.10.0`, `pydantic-settings>=2.7.0` — data models + env config
  - `beautifulsoup4`, `lxml` — HTML parsing in custom tools
  - `httpx>=0.28.0` — async HTTP client
  - `PyJWT>=2.9.0` — HS256 agent-scoped JWT issue/verify
  - `slowapi>=0.1.9` — rate limiting middleware
  - `logfire[fastapi,httpx]>=3.0.0` — observability
  - `playwright>=1.49.0` — browser automation (fallback mode)
- [ ] Add dev dependencies: `ruff>=0.8.0`, `pytest>=8.3.0`, `pytest-asyncio>=0.25.0`
- [ ] Configure Ruff in `pyproject.toml`:
  ```toml
  [tool.ruff]
  target-version = "py313"
  line-length = 88
  
  [tool.ruff.format]
  indent-style = "tab"
  quote-style = "double"
  ```
- [ ] Run `uv sync` to generate `uv.lock`
- [ ] Create `backend/.env.example` documenting required env vars
- [ ] Create `backend/.env` (gitignored) with development defaults
- [ ] Create multi-stage `Dockerfile` (builder → development → production) using `uv` + Playwright browser install + Xvfb
- [ ] Create `.dockerignore`
- [ ] Scaffold full `src/` directory structure:
  ```
  src/
  ├── __init__.py
  ├── main.py
  ├── database.py
  ├── models.py
  ├── core/
  │   ├── __init__.py
  │   ├── config.py
  │   ├── constants.py
  │   ├── dependencies.py
  │   ├── exceptions.py
  │   ├── exception_handlers.py
  │   └── utils.py
  ├── auth/
  │   ├── __init__.py
  │   ├── api_key.py
  │   ├── agent_jwt.py
  │   └── dependencies.py
  ├── agent/
  │   ├── __init__.py
  │   ├── agent.py
  │   ├── schemas.py
  │   └── router.py
  ├── airbnb/
  │   ├── __init__.py
  │   ├── schemas.py
  │   └── tools/
  │       ├── __init__.py
  │       ├── urls.py
  │       ├── parsers.py
  │       └── analysis.py
  └── browser/
      ├── __init__.py
      └── handlers/
  ```

### Frontend (`frontend/`)

- [ ] `pnpm create nuxt frontend/` (Node 22, pnpm)
- [ ] Install production deps: `@pinia/nuxt`, `shadcn-nuxt`, `@tailwindcss/vite`, `@tanstack/vue-query`, `@vueuse/core`, `vue-sonner`, `lucide-vue-next`, `reka-ui`, `class-variance-authority`, `clsx`, `tailwind-merge`
- [ ] Install dev deps: `@hey-api/openapi-ts`, `eslint`, `eslint-config-prettier`, `eslint-plugin-prettier`, `prettier`, `tw-animate-css`, `vue-tsc`
- [ ] Configure `nuxt.config.ts` with modules, Tailwind v4, SSR
- [ ] Configure `openapi-ts.config.ts` pointing at FastAPI OpenAPI schema
- [ ] Configure ESLint flat config (`eslint.config.mjs`) + `.prettierrc`
- [ ] Create `frontend/.env.example` with `NUXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL`, `NUXT_PUBLIC_WS_BASE_URL`, `NUXT_API_KEY`
- [ ] Create multi-stage `Dockerfile` (base → build → production using Nitro output)
- [ ] Create `.dockerignore`

### Root

- [ ] Create `docker-compose.yml` (placeholder, detailed in Step 8)
- [ ] Create/update `.gitignore` (Python + Node + Docker + env files)
- [ ] Create `.vscode/mcp.json`, `.vscode/settings.json`, `.vscode/extensions.json`
- [ ] Ensure `@playwright/mcp` is available via `npx`

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `cd backend && uv sync` succeeds with all deps installed
- [ ] `cd frontend && pnpm install` succeeds
- [ ] `cd backend && uv run ruff check . && uv run ruff format --check .` passes
- [ ] All `__init__.py` files exist with typed `__all__: list[str]`
- [ ] `.env.example` files document all required environment variables
- [ ] Directory structure matches the spec plan layout
- [ ] Both Dockerfiles build successfully

## Reference

toolCalls.arguments:
{"content": "# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# Stage 1: Builder — install uv, sync dependencies
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
FROM python:3.13-slim AS builder

ENV UV_COMPILE_BYTECODE=1 \
	UV_LINK_MODE=copy

COPY --from=ghcr.io/astral-sh/uv:latest /uv /uvx /bin/

WORKDIR /app

# Install dependencies first (layer caching)
COPY pyproject.toml uv.lock ./
RUN --mount=type=cache,target=/root/.cache/uv \
	uv sync --frozen --no-install-project --no-dev

# Copy source code and install project
COPY . .
RUN --mount=type=cache,target=/root/.cache/uv \
	uv sync --frozen --no-dev


# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# Stage 2: Development — includes dev deps + Playwright browsers
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
FROM python:3.13-slim AS development

# Install system deps for Playwright + Xvfb (headed anti-detection)
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
	xvfb \
	libnss3 \
	libatk1.0-0 \
	libatk-bridge2.0-0 \
	libcups2 \
	libdrm2 \
	libxkbcommon0 \
	libxcomposite1 \
	libxdamage1 \
	libxrandr2 \
	libgbm1 \
	libpango-1.0-0 \
	libcairo2 \
	libasound2 \
	libx11-xcb1 \
	libxshmfence1 \
	fonts-noto-color-emoji \
	nodejs \
	npm \
	&& rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

COPY --from=ghcr.io/astral-sh/uv:latest /uv /uvx /bin/

WORKDIR /app

COPY pyproject.toml uv.lock ./
RUN --mount=type=cache,target=/root/.cache/uv \
	uv sync --frozen --no-install-project

COPY . .
RUN --mount=type=cache,target=/root/.cache/uv \
	uv sync --frozen

# Install Playwright browsers
RUN uv run playwright install chromium

# Ensure @playwright/mcp is available
RUN npm install -g @playwright/mcp@latest

ENV DISPLAY=:99

EXPOSE 8000

CMD ["sh", "-c", "Xvfb :99 -screen 0 1920x1080x24 & uv run uvicorn src.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload"]


# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# Stage 3: Production — minimal runtime
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
FROM python:3.13-slim AS production

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
	xvfb \
	libnss3 \
	libatk1.0-0 \
	libatk-bridge2.0-0 \
	libcups2 \
	libdrm2 \
	libxkbcommon0 \
	libxcomposite1 \
	libxdamage1 \
	libxrandr2 \
	libgbm1 \
	libpango-1.0-0 \
	libcairo2 \
	libasound2 \
	libx11-xcb1 \
	libxshmfence1 \
	fonts-noto-color-emoji \
	nodejs \
	npm \
	&& rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install @playwright/mcp globally
RUN npm install -g @playwright/mcp@latest

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the built virtual environment from builder
COPY --from=builder /app/.venv /app/.venv
COPY --from=builder /app/src /app/src

# Install Playwright browsers in production
COPY --from=builder /app/pyproject.toml /app/uv.lock ./
COPY --from=ghcr.io/astral-sh/uv:latest /uv /uvx /bin/
RUN uv run playwright install chromium

ENV PATH="/app/.venv/bin:$PATH" \
	DISPLAY=:99

EXPOSE 8000

CMD ["sh", "-c", "Xvfb :99 -screen 0 1920x1080x24 & uvicorn src.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000"]

{"content": "# TripPlannerAgent — Docker Compose
# Usage:
#   Backend only:  docker compose --profile backend up --build
#   Full stack:    docker compose --profile full up --build

services:
  # ── Ollama (Local LLM) ──
  ollama:
    image: ollama/ollama:latest
    profiles: ["backend", "full"]
    ports:
      - "11434:11434"
    volumes:
      - ollama_data:/root/.ollama
    deploy:
      resources:
        reservations:
          devices:
            - driver: nvidia
              count: 1
              capabilities: [gpu]
    networks:
      - backend-net

  # ── FastAPI Backend ──
  backend:
    build:
      context: ./backend
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
      target: development
    profiles: ["backend", "full"]
    ports:
      - "8000:8000"
    env_file:
      - ./backend/.env
    environment:
      - OLLAMA_BASE_URL=http://ollama:11434
    volumes:
      - ./backend/src:/app/src
    depends_on:
      - ollama
    networks:
      - backend-net
      - frontend-net

  # ── Nuxt 3 Frontend ──
  frontend:
    build:
      context: ./frontend
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
      target: development
    profiles: ["full"]
    ports:
      - "3000:3000"
    environment:
      - NUXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://backend:8000
    volumes:
      - ./frontend:/app
      - /app/node_modules
    depends_on:
      - backend
    networks:
      - frontend-net

volumes:
  ollama_data:

networks:
  backend-net:
  frontend-net:

- `ruff format --check .` — 28 files already formatted

# ---- Base stage ----
FROM node:22-alpine AS base

ENV PNPM_HOME="/pnpm"
ENV PATH="$PNPM_HOME:$PATH"

RUN corepack enable

WORKDIR /app

# ---- Build stage ----
FROM base AS build

# Copy lockfile and package manifest first (layer cache for deps)
COPY package.json pnpm-lock.yaml ./

# Install dependencies; skip postinstall (nuxt prepare) since source isn't
# available yet — it will be run explicitly after the source is copied.
RUN --mount=type=cache,id=pnpm,target=/pnpm/store pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --ignore-scripts

# Copy the rest of the source and build the Nuxt app
COPY . ./

# Generate .nuxt/ types, path aliases, and auto-imports before building
RUN pnpm run postinstall
RUN pnpm run build

# ---- Runtime stage ----
FROM base AS production

# Only the .output directory is needed — Nitro bundles everything
COPY --from=build /app/.output /app/.output

ENV HOST=0.0.0.0
ENV PORT=3000

EXPOSE 3000

CMD ["node", "/app/.output/server/index.mjs"]

"""Application-wide configuration via pydantic-settings.

Provides two settings classes:
- ``Settings``: Core application config (Ollama, auth, CORS, rate limiting).
- ``FastAPIConfig``: FastAPI-specific config with ``FASTAPI_`` env prefix.
"""

from typing import Union

from pydantic import SecretStr, computed_field
from pydantic_settings import BaseSettings, SettingsConfigDict

from src.core.constants import Environment, ScrapingMode


class Settings(BaseSettings):
	"""Core application settings loaded from environment variables and ``.env`` file.

	All fields are documented with ``Field(description=...)``. Secrets use
	``SecretStr`` to prevent accidental logging.
	"""

	model_config = SettingsConfigDict(
		env_file=".env",
		env_file_encoding="utf-8",
		case_sensitive=False,
		extra="ignore",
	)

	# ── Application ──
	APP_NAME: str = "TripPlannerAgent"
	ENVIRONMENT: Environment = Environment.DEVELOPMENT

	# ── Ollama (LLM Provider) ──
	OLLAMA_BASE_URL: str = "http://localhost:11434"
	OLLAMA_MODEL_NAME: str = "qwen2.5:32b"

	# ── Authentication ──
	API_KEY: SecretStr
	AGENT_SECRET_KEY: SecretStr
	AGENT_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES: int = 30

	# ── CORS ──
	CORS_ORIGINS: list[str] = ["http://localhost:3000"]

	# ── API ──
	API_V1_PREFIX: str = "/api/v1"

	# ── Airbnb Scraping ──
	AIRBNB_SCRAPING_MODE: ScrapingMode = ScrapingMode.LIVE

	# ── Rate Limiting ──
	RATE_LIMIT_PER_MINUTE: int = 10

	# ── Observability ──
	LOGFIRE_TOKEN: Union[SecretStr, None] = None

	@computed_field
	@property
	def DEBUG(self) -> bool:
		"""Whether the application is running in debug mode.

		Returns:
			True if ``ENVIRONMENT`` is ``development`` or ``testing``.
		"""
		return self.ENVIRONMENT in (Environment.DEVELOPMENT, Environment.TESTING)


class FastAPIConfig(BaseSettings):
	"""FastAPI-specific settings with ``FASTAPI_`` env prefix.

	Controls the application metadata shown in auto-generated API docs
	and the OpenAPI schema availability.
	"""

	model_config = SettingsConfigDict(
		env_file=".env",
		env_file_encoding="utf-8",
		env_prefix="FASTAPI_",
		case_sensitive=False,
		extra="ignore",
	)

	TITLE: str = "TripPlannerAgent API"
	VERSION: str = "0.1.0"

# ── Build stage ──
FROM base AS build

ENV HOST=0.0.0.0
ENV PORT=3000

EXPOSE 3000

CMD ["node", "/app/.output/server/index.mjs"]

All frontend scaffolding tasks from issue #5 are complete. Here's a summary:

### Frontend scaffolding completed

**Project setup:**
- Nuxt 3 initialized with `pnpm create nuxt` (Node 22, pnpm)
- All scripts added: `lint`, `lint:fix`, `format`, `format:check`, `typecheck`, `api:generate`

**Dependencies (matching JobApplicationAutomationTool):**
- Production: `@nuxt/eslint`, `@pinia/nuxt`, `shadcn-nuxt`, `@tailwindcss/vite`, `@tanstack/vue-query`, `@vueuse/core`, `class-variance-authority`, `clsx`, `lucide-vue-next`, `reka-ui`, `tailwind-merge`, `tailwindcss`, `vue-sonner`
- Dev: `@hey-api/openapi-ts`, `eslint`, `eslint-config-prettier`, `eslint-plugin-prettier`, `prettier`, `tw-animate-css`, `typescript`, `vue-tsc`

**Configuration:**
- [nuxt.config.ts](frontend/nuxt.config.ts) — Modules, Tailwind v4 via Vite plugin, SSR, runtimeConfig (apiBaseUrl, wsBaseUrl, server-only apiKey), shadcn-nuxt setup
- [tailwind.config.ts](frontend/tailwind.config.ts) — Full design-system tokens (border radius, colors with CSS variable references, sidebar, charts, semantic status)
- [main.css](frontend/app/assets/css/main.css) — OKLCH color scheme (cyan/teal primary for travel theme), light/dark mode, `@config` directive pointing to `tailwind.config.ts`
- [eslint.config.mjs](frontend/eslint.config.mjs) — Extends `@nuxt/eslint` flat config, Prettier integration, shadcn-vue rules
- [.prettierrc](frontend/.prettierrc) / [.prettierignore](frontend/.prettierignore) — Same conventions as JobApplicationAutomationTool
- [openapi-ts.config.ts](frontend/openapi-ts.config.ts) — Points at FastAPI OpenAPI schema for client generation
- [components.json](frontend/components.json) — shadcn-vue CLI config (new-york style, lucide icons, Nuxt aliases)

**App structure:**
- [app/app.vue](frontend/app/app.vue), [layouts/default.vue](frontend/app/layouts/default.vue), [pages/index.vue](frontend/app/pages/index.vue) — Root layout + placeholder chat page
- [plugins/vue-query.ts](frontend/app/plugins/vue-query.ts) — TanStack Query plugin (staleTime: 30s, retry: 2)
- [stores/chat.ts](frontend/app/stores/chat.ts), [stores/ui.ts](frontend/app/stores/ui.ts) — Pinia stores (UI-only state)
- [lib/utils.ts](frontend/app/lib/utils.ts) — `cn()` utility (clsx + tailwind-merge)
- [server/api/agent/[...path].ts](frontend/server/api/agent/%5B...path%5D.ts) — Nitro proxy injecting X-API-Key server-side
- 5 shadcn-vue components: Badge, Button, Card, Input, Sonner

**Infrastructure:**
- [Dockerfile](frontend/Dockerfile) — Multi-stage (base → development → build → production) with pnpm + Nitro output
- [.dockerignore](frontend/.dockerignore), [.env.example](frontend/.env.example), [.gitignore](frontend/.gitignore)

**Validation:**
- `pnpm run format` — All 33 files formatted ✓
- `pnpm run lint` — Zero errors ✓
- `nuxt prepare` — Types generated ✓
